name: XAUUSD_M15_BBRsiMeanReversion_v1
hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, simultaneous Bollinger Band penetration and RSI extreme reading, gated by a BB-width volatility regime filter, produces profitable mean-reversion trades to the middle/opposite band with >2.0 PF over 200+ trades.

exits.take_profit: opposite Bollinger Band (middle_bb as fallback if touched within 3 bars)
exits.time_stop: close after 20 M15 bars (~5h) if neither hit
